changeSet.author: hr-dev
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE CANDIDATE ( ID NUMBER CONSTRAINT PK_CANDIDATE PRIMARY KEY, CND_REF_NO VARCHAR2(20) CONSTRAINT NN_CND_REF_NO NOT NULL CONSTRAINT UQ_CND_REF_NO UNIQUE, FULL_NAME VARCHAR2(200) CONSTRAINT NN_CND_FULL_NAME NOT NULL, EMAIL VARCHAR2(200) CONSTRAINT NN_CND_EMAIL NOT NULL, PHONE VARCHAR2(20), NATIONALITY VARCHAR2(100), CV_FILE_PATH VARCHAR2(500), SKILLS VARCHAR2(2000), EXPERIENCE_YEARS NUMBER(3), EDUCATION VARCHAR2(500), CURRENT_ROLE VARCHAR2(200), UPDATED_AT TIMESTAMP DEFAULT SYSTIMESTAMP, CONSTRAINT UQ_CND_EMAIL UNIQUE (EMAIL) )
